title: aegilops ovata var. microstachys
intro: Aegilops ovata var. microstachys, also known as desert spelt or jointed goatgrass, is a type of wild grass with edible seeds. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The seeds of Aegilops ovata var. microstachys have been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, due to their high nutritional value and health benefits. The seeds can be prepared as a tea, added to soups or salads, or ground into flour for baking, providing a rich source of fiber, vitamins, and minerals.
